description: Moderate realistic metrics — compliance ~82%, 20+ issues, 70-80% closure rate, ~94% coverage, no start delay, efficient rating. Tests standard narration.
High compliance (>=90%), >=95% coverage, <=1 High+ZT issue, high closure rate (>90%), no delays, efficiency >100%. Tests suppression of all bold (no negative signals).
Low compliance (<70%), <80% coverage, >=4 High+ZT issues, low closure rate (<50%), duration overrun, delayed efficiency rating. Tests all bold triggers firing.
0 total issues, 0 open, 0 High+ZT, 0 closed, closureRatePct='', high coverage. Tests zero-value reporting and empty-string handling for closureRatePct.
All issues are High or Zero Tolerance (e.g., 10 total, 10 High+ZT split as 7 High + 3 ZT). Tests High+ZT split narration when it equals totalIssues.
auditStartDelayDays > 0 (late start, bold), but submissionDelayDays < 0 (early submission, no bold) and durationDifferenceDays < 0 (ahead of plan). Tests mixed bold/no-bold in P2.
durationDifferenceDays > 0 (overrun, bold), submissionDelayDays > 0 (late submission), efficiencyRating='Delayed' (bold). Tests all P2+P3 negative bold triggers.
Delay <= 2 days, efficiencyRating='Moderate', efficiencyScorePct < 100. Tests that 'Moderate' is NOT bolded.
complianceScorePct='', auditRating='', executionDurationDays='', plannedAuditDurationDays='', efficiencyScorePct=''. Tests 'Not Available' substitution and auditRating silent omission.
auditRating='' with all other fields present and healthy. Tests that auditRating is silently omitted (no 'Not Available') while everything else narrates normally.
